Bash(cd /c/Users/pkase/Desktop/CANIMAKEADOLLAR/polymarket-trader-1.0.12 && py -c "
content = open\('shared/composite_signal.py'\).read\(\)

# Change 2: DEFAULT_WEIGHTS
old = '''DEFAULT_WEIGHTS = {
    \\"btc_vs_reference\\":      0.45,
    \\"vol_adjusted_momentum\\": 0.22,
    \\"price_acceleration\\":    0.13,
    \\"momentum_15m\\":          0.12,
    \\"momentum_1m\\":           0.08,
    \\"momentum_5m\\":           0.00,
    \\"cex_poly_lag\\":          0.00,
    \\"volume_ratio\\":          0.00,
    \\"trade_flow_ratio\\":      0.00,
    \\"order_imbalance\\":       0.00,
    \\"momentum_consistency\\":  0.00,
}'''
new = '''DEFAULT_WEIGHTS = {
    \\"btc_vs_reference\\":      0.315,   # dominant signal, corr=0.263
    \\"vol_adjusted_momentum\\": 0.194,   # corr=0.206
    \\"momentum_5m\\":           0.136,   # corr=0.173
    \\"cex_poly_lag\\":          0.136,   # corr=0.172 -- the arb signal
    \\"momentum_1m\\":           0.111,   # corr=0.156, was underweighted
    \\"price_acceleration\\":    0.074,   # corr=0.098
    \\"momentum_15m\\":          0.034,   # corr=0.071, trend confirmation only
    \\"volume_ratio\\":          0.000,   # handled as pre-filter, not scorer
    \\"trade_flow_ratio\\":      0.000,   # corr=0.051, noise
    \\"order_imbalance\\":       0.000,   # corr=0.034, near zero
    \\"momentum_consistency\\":  0.000,   # corr=-0.021, negative
}'''
assert old in content, 'CHANGE 2 NOT FOUND: ' + repr\(content[content.find\('DEFAULT_WEIGHTS'\):content.find\('DEFAULT_WEIGHTS'\)+400]\)
content = content.replace\(old, new, 1\)

# Change 1: RSI thresholds
assert 'RSI_OVERBOUGHT     = 72' in content, 'RSI_OB NOT FOUND'
assert 'RSI_OVERSOLD       = 28' in content, 'RSI_OS NOT FOUND'
content = content.replace\(
    'RSI_OVERBOUGHT     = 72            # avoid chasing already-overbought',
    'RSI_OVERBOUGHT     = 85            # only block extreme exhaustion spikes'
\)
content = content.replace\(
    'RSI_OVERSOLD       = 28            # avoid chasing already-oversold',
    'RSI_OVERSOLD       = 15            # only block extreme capitulation'
\)

# Change 10: MIN_MOMENTUM from config
old10 = '    # Minimum momentum filter\\n    if m5 is not None and abs\(m5\) < MIN_MOMENTUM_ABS:\\n        return False, f\\"momentum too weak \({m5:+.3f}% < ±{MIN_MOMENTUM_ABS}%\)\\"'
new10 = '    # Minimum momentum filter -- read from config, fall back to module default\\n    min_mom = \(config or {}\).get\(\\"min_momentum_pct\\", MIN_MOMENTUM_ABS\)\\n    if m5 is not None and abs\(m5\) < min_mom:\\n        return False, f\\"momentum too weak \({m5:+.3f}% < ±{min_mom}%\)\\"'
assert old10 in content, 'CHANGE 10 NOT FOUND'
content = content.replace\(old10, new10, 1\)

# Change 9: RSI thresholds from config
old9 = '    # RSI filters -- only apply when we have both RSI and a clear direction\\n    if rsi is not None:\\n        if m5 is not None and m5 > 0 and rsi > RSI_OVERBOUGHT:\\n            return False, f\\"RSI overbought \({rsi:.0f} > {RSI_OVERBOUGHT}\), skip long\\"\\n        if m5 is not None and m5 < 0 and rsi < RSI_OVERSOLD:\\n            return False, f\\"RSI oversold \({rsi:.0f} < {RSI_OVERSOLD}\), skip short\\"'
new9 = '    # RSI filters -- thresholds read from config if available, else module defaults\\n    rsi_ob = \(config or {}\).get\(\\"rsi_overbought\\", RSI_OVERBOUGHT\)\\n    rsi_os = \(config or {}\).get\(\\"rsi_oversold\\",   RSI_OVERSOLD\)\\n    if rsi is not None:\\n        if m5 is not None and m5 > 0 and rsi > rsi_ob:\\n            return False, f\\"RSI overbought \({rsi:.0f} > {rsi_ob}\), skip long\\"\\n        if m5 is not None and m5 < 0 and rsi < rsi_os:\\n            return False, f\\"RSI oversold \({rsi:.0f} < {rsi_os}\), skip short\\"'
if old9 not in content:
    # Try with unicode em-dash style comment
    idx = content.find\('RSI filters'\)
    print\('RSI block context:', repr\(content[idx-4:idx+300]\)\)
assert old9 in content, 'CHANGE 9 NOT FOUND'
content = content.replace\(old9, new9, 1\)

open\('shared/composite_signal.py', 'w'\).write\(content\)
print\('Step 1 done'\)
")
